title: zanthoxylum ailanthoides f. inerme
intro: Zanthoxylum ailanthoides f. inerme, also known as Prickly Ash or Huang Bai, is a type of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese and other Eastern cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum ailanthoides f. inerme include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
